topicA: B2B Content Strategy in the AI Search Era

recap.intro: This week you explored two areas of B2B marketing: how AI is changing content strategy and the evolution of how businesses sell to each other.
bullets: The real opportunity with AI search is creating genuinely new and useful information that others don't have, like original studies or expert insights.
Social media is now almost as important as AI assistants for business buyers researching big purchases, especially with younger buying teams.
Your own website is still incredibly important in the 'zero-click era,' as AI can't kill websites that build connections.
The old ways businesses sell are no longer working, requiring a complete rethinking of 'go-to-market' strategies due to customers being harder to find.
recap.closing: This week you learned that staying authentic and adaptable in a rapidly changing digital landscape is key to B2B marketing success.
